title: Task success_criteria are objects, replacing acceptance_criteria
description: The task field acceptance_criteria is replaced by success_criteria. Each entry is an object { statement, status: pass|fail, verified_by, verified_at, evidence }. statement is binary and outcome-based. A task is done when every entry is pass.

evidence.reference: task items declare acceptance_criteria, not success_criteria

impact: Task schema declares acceptance_criteria as a string array; strings carry no status or proof, so done-ness and verification are not machine-checkable from the criterion.
proposed_resolution: Rename acceptance_criteria to success_criteria and change each item from string to the criterion object.
